statement.en: Critical Analysis of Netra roga nidanas (Causative factors) as per Ayurveda
statement.summary: Freshwater reservoirs play a vital role in sustaining fish biodiversity and supporting local livelihoods. The present study assesses the fish diversity and ecological status of the Majalgaon Reservoir located on the Sindphana River in Maharashtra, India. Seasonal surveys were conducted to document fish species composition, abundance, and distribution using standard sampling techniques and taxonomic identification keys. Physico-chemical parameters of water such as temperature, pH, dissolved oxygen, turbidity, and nutrient levels were analyzed to evaluate the ecological health of the reservoir. The study recorded a diverse assemblage of fish species belonging to different families, indicating moderate to good biodiversity. However, variations in species richness and water quality parameters

proposer: Subrat Kumar Nayak, K. RATHORE, Dinesh Singh Gaur et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission exhibits fatal categorical mismatch: title claims Ayurvedic ophthalmology (Netra roga nidanas), abstract describes freshwater ichthyology/limnology (fish biodiversity in Majalgaon Reservoir), and category tags as cs.AI. No coherent truth-evaluable proposition exists across these incompatible domains. The document structure is incoherent—neither the title nor abstract nor category alignment permits meaningful axiom evaluation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 生物多様性は時間と水質と季節の平衡の中に隠れている。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 淡水の容器の中で、生命は互いに触れ合い、時間とともに揺らぐ。
